features: FUN TO CREATE! - Crystal Art Kits are an enjoyable introduction to Diamond Painting. An accessible entry-level kit to a unique pastime, taking the crafting world by storm!
START A COLLECTION OF SPARKLING ART - A perfect gift item for a friend or decoration for your home or living space.

AN ENGAGING CRAFT FOR STRESS RELIEF - The process of creating a Craft Buddy Crystal Art Kit by hand is a tranquil and engaging hobby. Share with family and friends, or take a mindful moment to yourself, away from screen time!

EVERYTHING YOU NEED IS INCLUDED - Each kit comes with everything in one handy pack, including adhesive template, pick up tool, gem tray, jelly wax, and the finest dimensional resin gems, bevelled to create shimmer and shine.
GREAT VALUE FOR MONEY - Perfect for gifting to a crafter, and ideal for all levels, including children, beginners and advanced crafters.
description: It is always useful to have a few cards put aside, ready for when an occasion comes up unexpectedly. A popular design that can be used for any greeting is exactly what the 'Pretty Flowers' Crystal Art Card Kit from Craft Buddy is. Blank inside for your own message, this bright card will sparkle and shine with it's floral pattern, and is perfect for feminine occasions of any age. This DIY diamond painting card it not only provides an engaging pastime but also results in a charming greeting for friends and family. This small size card is perfect to try diamond painting as a beginner, but you don't have to be to enjoy this craft. The technique of diamond art painting is similar to painting by numbers, where each Crystal Art card design has a numbered adhesive template. Using the handy pick up tool, simply lift up the coloured crystals and place them on the corresponding numbered dots. Product Contents: 1 x Crystal Art card adhesive template 1 x Envelope 1 x Pick up pen 1 x Tray 1 x Wax Bags of crystals Ziplock bags for spare crystals Product Dimensions: The finished card is 11cm x 22cm cm in size (slim portrait) Age Range: This product is suitable for individuals aged 8 years and above Time to complete: 30-45 minutes to complete (depending on experience)
